news.title: Photo gallery: Nuclear Energy Agency Director-General visits Mizzou
news.summary_en: The University of Missouri welcomed Mr. William D. Magwood, IV, who spoke this week as part of the President's Distinguished Lecture Series. See photos from his visit.

news.title: Mizzou breaks ground on Radioisotope Science Center to strengthen nation’s supply of critical isotopes
Inside the ‘New Nuclear Era’: Mr. William D. Magwood, IV on global resurgence of nuclear energy and what comes next
news.summary_en: The Director-General of the Nuclear Energy Agency will deliver remarks on May 13 as part of the President’s Distinguished Lecture series.

news.title: Mizzou to recognize three trailblazers with honorary degrees during spring commencement
news.summary_en: Hayes Barnard, Barbara Stubbs Cochran and Rodger O. Riney will be recognized at commencement ceremonies this weekend.

news.title: Mizzou to celebrate nearly 6,000 graduates at spring commencement
news.summary_en: At this weekend’s ceremonies, the University of Missouri will award 6,432 degrees to 5,967 students.

news.title: Members of Mizzou ROTC units ready to transition to commissioned officers
news.summary_en: Meet representatives from the university’s Air Force, Army and Navy officer training programs
